ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: B12 Vanguard 8-round automatic shotgun barrel
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: Standard B12 Vanguard bullpup shotgun barrel with an integrated 8-round tube and a three-shot automatic firing cycle. Placeholder balance.

ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: B12 Vanguard 15-round bolt-action barrel
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: High-capacity B12 Vanguard bullpup shotgun barrel with an integrated 15-round tube, a bolt-action firing cycle, and improved short-to-medium range consistency. Placeholder balance.

ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: B12 Vanguard magazine-fed long bolt-action barrel
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: An extended development of the B12's bolt-action assembly. Its longer barrel improves reach and shot consistency, while a detachable-magazine feed interface allows the operator to replace the entire ammunition supply instead of loading shells one at a time. The additional length and feed hardware make the weapon heavier and slower to bring on target.

ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: B12 Vanguard standard grip
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: The B12's standard polymer pistol grip, shaped for reliable control without changing the weapon's balance.

ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: B12 Vanguard threaded traction grip
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: A deeply threaded anti-slip grip that locks the weapon into the firing hand. It improves close-range acquisition and control, at the cost of a small amount of added material and weight.

ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: B12 Vanguard skeletonized grip
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: A hollowed, skeletonized grip that reduces weight and speeds presentation. Its open structure provides less support during deliberate fire, trading medium- and long-range stability for mobility.

ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: B12 Vanguard bullpup stock
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: Standard B12 Vanguard stock and rear receiver module. Placeholder balance.

ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: B12 Vanguard ergonomic recoil pad
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: A contoured ergonomic buttpad that spreads recoil across the shoulder and improves repeat-shot recovery. It adds some weight behind the receiver, but makes the B12 steadier throughout its practical engagement envelope.

ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: B12 Vanguard short detachable magazine
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: The standard short magazine used by the magazine-fed B12 barrel when Combat Extended is not active.

ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: 10-round B12 detachable magazine
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: A compact 10-round detachable magazine for the B12's magazine-fed barrel. It replaces the weapon's full ammunition supply in one operation instead of requiring individual shells to be loaded.

ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: 20-round B12 extended magazine
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: An extended 20-round detachable magazine for the B12. It doubles the short magazine's capacity for sustained fighting, but its larger shell stack adds weight and takes longer to seat securely.
